contacts.title: Director - Administration & Operations

reasons: Jaypee Hospital operates within the 'hospital & health care' industry, aligning perfectly with the ICP's focus on healthcare providers.
The estimated employee count of 900 falls within the ideal 501-1000 range for company size.

While the revenue figure of $50,000,000 (assuming USD, as it's provided as a single number) is slightly below the ICP's target of $20M-$55M, it indicates a financially stable organization capable of investing in advanced technologies.
As a large healthcare institution, it's likely to be undergoing or considering digital transformation initiatives, creating a need for custom software, AR/VR, and AI solutions.
The scale of operations suggests a need for advanced training and operational efficiency improvements, which Hexanova's services can address.
The presence of departments and leadership roles within a hospital of this size makes decision-maker relevance high.
A hospital of this size and scope implies a business maturity level that can support the adoption of innovative technologies.

pain_points: Enhancing the realism and effectiveness of surgical and diagnostic training for medical staff to improve patient outcomes.
Streamlining hospital operational workflows and administrative processes to improve efficiency and reduce costs.
Leveraging advanced technologies like AI and AR/VR for patient care, diagnostics, or medical education to stay competitive and improve service delivery.
